Bash(cd "C:/Users/hirsc/PycharmProjects/PythonW/pacos-website" && node -e "
const sharp = require\('sharp'\);

sharp\('public/images/timeline/1902.jpg'\)
  .greyscale\(\)
  .normalize\(\)
  .linear\(2.5, -180\)         // heavy contrast: text black, bg white
  .threshold\(200\)             // binarize: text vs background
  .negate\(\)                   // invert: white text on black
  .negate\(\)                   // back to: black text on white \(cleans noise\)
  .flatten\({ background: { r: 252, g: 250, b: 244 } }\)
  .toFile\('public/images/timeline/1902_v2.jpg'\)
  .then\(info => console.log\('Done:', info\)\)
  .catch\(err => console.error\(err\)\);
")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/hirsc/PycharmProjects/PythonW/pacos-website" && node -e "
const sharp = require\('sharp'\);

// Approach: gentle cleanup, preserve fine calligraphy strokes
sharp\('public/images/timeline/1902.jpg'\)
  .greyscale\(\)
  .normalize\(\)
  .modulate\({ brightness: 1.15 }\)
  .linear\(1.6, -60\)          // moderate contrast boost
  .median\(2\)                  // remove paper grain noise
  .sharpen\({ sigma: 0.8 }\)   // re-sharpen text edges
  .flatten\({ background: { r: 250, g: 248, b: 242 } }\)  // warm cream
  .toFile\('public/images/timeline/1902_v3.jpg'\)
  .then\(info => console.log\('Done:', info\)\)
  .catch\(err => console.error\(err\)\);
")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/hirsc/PycharmProjects/PythonW/pacos-website" && node -e "
const sharp = require\('sharp'\);

// Final version: clean the fold line and edge shadows
sharp\('public/images/timeline/1902.jpg'\)
  .greyscale\(\)
  .normalize\(\)
  .modulate\({ brightness: 1.2 }\)
  .linear\(1.8, -80\)
  .median\(3\)                  // stronger noise/fold removal
  .sharpen\({ sigma: 1.0 }\)
  .flatten\({ background: { r: 250, g: 248, b: 242 } }\)
  .resize\(2200, 840, { fit: 'cover' }\)
  .toFile\('public/images/timeline/1902_final.jpg'\)
  .then\(info => console.log\('Done:', info\)\)
  .catch\(err => console.error\(err\)\);
")
